parameters.query:
SELECT json_build_object(
  'totals', json_build_object(
    'active', (SELECT count(*) FROM client_access_tokens WHERE revoked_at IS NULL AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > now())),
    'revoked', (SELECT count(*) FROM client_access_tokens WHERE revoked_at IS NOT NULL),
    'expired', (SELECT count(*) FROM client_access_tokens WHERE revoked_at IS NULL AND expires_at IS NOT NULL AND expires_at <= now()),
    'never_used', (SELECT count(*) FROM client_access_tokens WHERE revoked_at IS NULL AND last_used_at IS NULL),
    'expiring_7d', (SELECT count(*) FROM client_access_tokens WHERE revoked_at IS NULL AND expires_at BETWEEN now() AND now() + INTERVAL '7 days')
  ),
  'by_purpose', (SELECT json_object_agg(purpose, n) FROM (SELECT purpose, count(*) AS n FROM client_access_tokens WHERE revoked_at IS NULL AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > now()) GROUP BY purpose) t),
  'recent', (SELECT json_agg(t.* ORDER BY t.created_at DESC) FROM (
    SELECT cat.id, cat.purpose, cat.expires_at, cat.last_used_at, cat.revoked_at, cat.created_at,
           p.name AS project_name, c.name AS client_name
      FROM client_access_tokens cat
      LEFT JOIN projects p ON p.id = cat.project_id
      LEFT JOIN clients  c ON c.id = cat.client_id
     ORDER BY cat.created_at DESC
     LIMIT 30
  ) t)
) AS report;
